title: pyrus callosa
intro: Pyrus callosa, also known as the Chinese pear or sand pear, is a species of deciduous pear tree native to southern China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pyrus callosa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestion, among others. Herbal preparations of Pyrus callosa are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
